ecarx.carext.update.ota

Interface IOtaInstallErrorRepair


  • public interface IOtaInstallErrorRepair
    This class provides the API for installation anomaly repair.
    Since:
    11

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default boolean registerErrorRepairListener(InstallErrorRepairListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain install error repair.
      default boolean repairInstallError()
      Fix the installation errors of ECU.
      default boolean requestInstallErrorList()
      Request get the list of install error ecu.
      default void unregisterErrorRepairListener(InstallErrorRepairListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.

    • Method Detail

      • requestInstallErrorList

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean requestInstallErrorList()
        Request get the list of install error ecu. through the callback InstallErrorRepairListener.onRepairInstallStateCallback(List).
        Since:
        11

      • repairInstallError

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean repairInstallError()
        Fix the installation errors of ECU.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The status will be notified later through the callback InstallErrorRepairListener.onRepairInstallStateCallback(List).
        Since:
        11

      • registerErrorRepairListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean registerErrorRepairListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                     InstallErrorRepairListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain install error repair.
        Since:
        11

      • unregisterErrorRepairListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default void unregisterErrorRepairListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                    InstallErrorRepairListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Since:
        11
